name: 雕塑与立体
subject: art
domain_name: 视觉艺术 / Visual Arts / Visual Arts
curriculum_points: Students in MYP years 2-4 will be able to manipulate a variety of materials (e.g., clay, wire, found objects) using additive, subtractive, and construction techniques to create three-dimensional forms.
Students will be able to apply an understanding of spatial relationships, scale, and structural integrity to design and realize sculptural artworks.
